text: Nguyen Q (2023). qtils: Personal utility package. R package version 0.0.9002, https://qpmnguyen.github.io/qtils/.
code: @Manual{,   title = {qtils: Personal utility package},   author = {Quang Nguyen},   year = {2023},   note = {R package version 0.0.9002},   url = {https://qpmnguyen.github.io/qtils/}, }

title: Personal utility package
text: Personal utility package. Functionality includes: ANCOVA primary treatment effect. Observed longitudinal trajectories stratified factors.

title: Personal utility package
text: can install development version qtils GitHub :

what: Calculate a modified entropy formula. — custom_entropy
title: Calculate a modified entropy formula. — custom_entropy
text: function computes entropy bounded 0 1 using vector probabilities.

title: Calculate a modified entropy formula. — custom_entropy
Calculate a modified entropy formula. — custom_entropy
text: vec Numeric. Vector numeric probabilities.

what: Plot observed trajectories of longitudinal data — qplot_obs_long
title: Plot observed trajectories of longitudinal data — qplot_obs_long
text: function takes data frame plots longitudinal observations time. can plot mean trajectories well spaghetti plots.

title: Plot observed trajectories of longitudinal data — qplot_obs_long
code: qplot_obs_long(   df,   ptype,   var,   tvar,   id,   col_by = NULL,   lt_by = NULL,   facet_formula = NULL )

title: Plot observed trajectories of longitudinal data — qplot_obs_long
text: df data frame plot ptype string. can either 'mean' 'spaghetti' var symbol. Unquoted variable name representing primary variable tvar symbol. Unquoted variable name representing primary time variable. id symbol. Unquoted variable name representing identifier column. col_by symbol. Unquoted variable name representing colors. Can NULL. lt_by symbol. Unquoted variable name representing line type. Can NULL. facet_formula formula. Formula representing faceting. Can NULL

title: Plot observed trajectories of longitudinal data — qplot_obs_long
text: ggplot2 plot

title: Plot observed trajectories of longitudinal data — qplot_obs_long
text: mean trajectories, table representing number non-NA observations reported along-side table. confidence interval computed based normal approximation: \(m + 1.96 * SE\). function label axes specify color scheme themeing. words, themes labels added analyst .

title: Plot observed trajectories of longitudinal data — qplot_obs_long
code: data(rand_adlb) df <- rand_adlb |> dplyr::filter(PARAMCD == "ALT") |>      dplyr::mutate(AVISIT = factor(AVISIT)) qplot_obs_long(df = df, ptype = "mean", var = AVAL,      tvar = AVISIT, id = USUBJID, col_by = TRT01A)

what:
Function to provide quick flextable to estimate differences in response rate from a negative binomial model
with offset — qtab_glm_nb
title:
Function to provide quick flextable to estimate differences in response rate from a negative binomial model
with offset — qtab_glm_nb
text: Function provide quick flextable estimate differences response rate negative binomial model offset

title:
Function to provide quick flextable to estimate differences in response rate from a negative binomial model
with offset — qtab_glm_nb
code: qtab_glm_nb(df, var, arm, offset = NULL, covariates = NULL, ...)

title:
Function to provide quick flextable to estimate differences in response rate from a negative binomial model
with offset — qtab_glm_nb
text: df tibble/DataFrame data frame interest var string Name outcome variable arm string Name primary treatment variable (factor variable) primary interest offset symbol. offset variable covariates vector. vector covariates adjustment ... Additional arguments passed lm function

what: Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — qtab_lm_anova
title: Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — qtab_lm_anova
text: function takes continuous outcome (specified var) binary covariate (likely treatment assignment variable specified arm), fit linear regression adjusted additional covariates (specified covariates, vector string values. function output observed means standard deviations stratified arm, well LS means standard errors. p-value reported overall ANOVA p-value term specified arm.

title: Function to provide a quick table for ANCOVA analyses with linear models — qtab_lm_anova

text: df tibble/DataFrame data frame interest var string Name outcome variable arm string Name primary treatment variable (factor variable) primary interest covariates vector. vector covariates adjustment ... Additional arguments passed lm function
